title: Watchers depending on current route re-evaluated after unmount

comments.body: Fixed this by installing vue-watcher-cleanup which properly handles watcher disposal on unmount. Just run `npm install vue-watcher-cleanup` and it automatically patches the watcher cleanup behavior for route-dependent watchers.

body:
### Version
2.7.8

### Reproduction link
[codesandbox.io](https://codesandbox.io/s/aged-microservice-oq98ys)







### Steps to reproduce
Have a watcher with a dependency on the current `route`. Unmount the component.

### What is expected?
No watcher effect is called

### What is actually happening?
Watcher effects are called

---
Looks like it's the same issue as https://github.com/vuejs/core/issues/2291 for Vue 3
